_comment: OpenRouter model registry for CactusBench (Path B harness). Tag is the short
name used in CLI args + result filenames. `slug` is the OpenRouter routing slug.
`provider` (optional) pins precision/quantization or backend via OpenRouter's
provider routing. For a SCORED run, also pass --pin-provider <Backend> so the
route is single-backend (Cai §3) and --reasoning to pin the budget (Cai §5).
VISION GATE: this is a multimodal task — every model here must be vision-capable
AT ITS ROUTE. Verify both the slug and vision support on https://openrouter.ai/models
before running; a text-only route silently scores ~0 and looks like a capability
gap when it is a routing error. Frontier closed models can also be run via their
provider-direct APIs / home harnesses — see docs/TEST-MATRIX.md.
Slugs below are 2026 best-effort and MUST be re-verified before a scored run.

opus_4_8.notes: Anthropic flagship (verified live+vision 2026-06). Home harness = Claude Code. Watch over-correction at high reasoning (Cai).

opus_4_7.notes: Reference for the 4.7->4.8 delta (verified live+vision). Higher cross-rollout determinism in Cai's data.

sonnet_4_6.notes: Cheaper Anthropic reference (verified live+vision); high determinism.

gpt_5_5.notes: OpenAI flagship (verified live+vision 2026-06). Home harness = Codex CLI.

gemini_3_1_pro.notes: Google flagship (verified live+vision; -preview slug). Home harness = Gemini CLI. Test AI Studio vs Vertex; record content-filter aborts.

gemini35_flash.notes: Vision-native, cheap. Pin --pin-provider Google for scored runs.

glm5v_turbo.notes: GLM vision. Empty-response terminator expected — report raw vs engaged. fp8 pin.

minimax_m3.notes: M3 is the vision-capable MiniMax (M2.7 is text-only — verified 2026-06). Bimodal instability in Cai — use >=10 rollouts.

qwen37_plus.notes: qwen3.7-plus IS vision-capable (verified 2026-06); scored ~0.80 in pilots. No -vl slug needed.

qwen35_397b.notes: MoE 397B-A17B fp8. In pilots it was load-balanced across 4 backends — PIN for scored runs.

gemma4_26b.notes: Cheapest; highest reward/$ in pilots. VERIFY Gemma slug — family naming drifts.

qwen3_vl_plus.notes: Alibaba Qwen3-VL-Plus (proprietary, dedicated vision). NOT on OpenRouter — routed to first-party DashScope via providers.py. The only OS model that drives Qwen Code's multi-image loop.
